name: returning quiet lead → warm re-welcome, not restart
rule: Reply must NOT restart discovery from scratch (must NOT re-ask name, intent, or area since those are already known from the lead profile). Should warmly welcome them back. May mention a new or matching property. Must NOT be cold or say "who are you?" Must feel continuous, not like a fresh start.
raw:
No worries at all, Arjun! Welcome back. Let me show you the best 2BHK options currently available in Baner within your ₹80L budget:

🏡 **2BHK Sunrise Park**
📍 Baner
🛏️ 2BHK · 📐 1,080 sqft · 💰 ₹79L
🗓️ Ready to move
✨ Gym · Clubhouse · East-facing · Vastu-friendly layout
📌 East-facing, so you get beautiful morning light

🏡 **3BHK Skyline Residency**
📍 Baner
🛏️ 3BHK · 📐 1,450 sqft · 💰 ₹95L
🗓️ Ready to move
✨ Gym · Pool · East-facing · Premium society · 2 covered parking

Which one catches your eye? I can share more details or photos for either.
